summary.profileStatement: I am a ninth-year engineer who has focused on solving manual operations and fragmented monitoring in finance and public-sector security infrastructure. At Nextrade, I redesigned the security response flow for an environment with 150 servers, 300 endpoints, and 80 network devices by combining 32 Splunk ES detection rules with n8n automation. That work established alerting within 30 seconds and reduced manual firewall policy lookup time by 80%. More recently, I have been focusing on senior-level ownership across design, observability, and DevSecOps-style automation.

careers.project: Nextrade Trading Execution System Security Operations SM
careers.description:
[Problem] Security event response and firewall policy lookup were still manual in a 24/7 trading environment with 150 servers, 300 endpoints, 80 network devices, and 100K+ daily trades.
[Action] I operated 32 Splunk ES detection rules, connected real-time Slack alerts through n8n workflows, and built a Python library for policy lookup using the FortiManager API.
[Result] Alerts were delivered within 30 seconds, firewall policy lookup time was reduced by 80%, and unnecessary alerts were reduced by 70% through automation.
[Stack] Splunk, Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, n8n, Python, Docker, Linux

careers.myRole: Security architecture design and FortiGate HA implementation owner
careers.description:
[Problem] A new exchange had to standardize security infrastructure for 150 servers and 80 network devices on a tight timeline before FSC production approval.
[Action] I designed the FGCP-based FortiGate Active-Passive HA architecture, established segmentation, L2/L3, VPN, and NAC access-control design, and standardized initial setup and policy rollout with Ansible roles and the FortiManager API.
[Result] The environment passed FSC production approval, reached a 99.99% HA design target, and established an operational standard with less dependence on manual setup.
[Stack] FortiGate, FortiManager, Ansible, Python, Linux, VMware

careers.project: AI Equity Investment Service Security Operations
careers.teamSize: Infrastructure and information security team (size undisclosed)
careers.myRole: AWS security operations and observability engineer
careers.description:
[Problem] AWS security operations for the AI asset-management platform were spread across the console, making audit evidence and security metrics difficult to organize.
[Action] I codified VPCs, subnets, and security groups with Terraform, tightened IAM and WAF operating standards, integrated CloudTrail and GuardDuty logs into CloudWatch, and built Prometheus/Grafana dashboards.
[Result] The platform gained an audit-ready operating baseline for robo-advisor testbed reviews and shifted to code-and-log-centric security operations.
[Stack] AWS, Terraform, CloudTrail, GuardDuty, Prometheus, Grafana

careers.myRole: Cloud migration and CI/CD security build engineer
careers.description:
[Problem] The e-commerce platform had to move from on-premises to AWS without established container security standards or deployment verification gates.
[Action] I designed the AWS VPC migration architecture, defined RBAC and Pod Security standards for EKS, and built Helm-based deployment automation plus GitLab CI/CD static-analysis and security-scan stages.
[Result] Backup and recovery automation reduced MTTR by 50% (2 hours → 1 hour), while added security scans improved early vulnerability detection by 80% before the migration handoff.
[Stack] AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Helm, GitLab CI/CD

careers.myRole: NSX-T micro-segmentation and integrated security policy designer
careers.description:
[Problem] The university needed tighter east-west traffic control and unified security governance during its next-generation information-system transition.
[Action] I designed VMware NSX-T DFW-based micro-segmentation, integrated NAC, DLP, and APT policy flows, and built security monitoring with Wazuh and Kibana.
[Result] Monthly incidents fell by 25% (12 → 9), prevention effectiveness reached 80% with 200 blocked events per month, sensitive-data detection improved by 20%, and service availability held at 99.9%.
[Stack] VMware NSX-T, Firewall, NAC, DLP, Wazuh, Kibana, Linux

careers.myRole: VPN/NAC automation and switch inspection automation engineer
careers.description:
[Problem] A 1,000-user remote-work transition had to be launched urgently during COVID-19 while VPN/NAC exception handling and switch checks were still manual.
[Action] I built the FortiGate SSL VPN and NAC integration model, automated NAC exception rollout with Ansible, and developed Python-based Cisco switch checks and VPN session monitoring dashboards.
[Result] Switch inspection time dropped by 75% (8 hours → 2 hours), NAC exception processing dropped by 90% (30 minutes → 3 minutes), support tickets fell by 40% (20/week → 12/week), and three new sites were delivered.
[Stack] Ansible, Python, VPN, NAC, Zabbix, PRTG, Linux

careers.myRole: Closed-network server operations and security patching engineer
careers.description:
[Problem] The manufacturing security environment had to operate 50+ Linux servers and firewall policies in a closed network with fragmented asset, patch, and vulnerability processes.
[Action] I established log-based inspection routines, redesigned firewall policies, supported manufacturing/development network separation, and formalized monthly vulnerability checks and security patch procedures.
[Result] Duplicate firewall rules were reduced by 30% (3,000 → 2,100), internal information leakage incidents stayed at zero during network separation, and critical vulnerabilities were remediated within two weeks at a 100% rate.
[Stack] Linux, Windows Server, Shell Script, Firewall

personalProjects.name: Observability Platform
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] Metrics and logs across the homelab were fragmented, which slowed down root-cause analysis.
[Action] I collected 50+ metric endpoints with Prometheus and unified three data sources—Loki, Elasticsearch, and Prometheus—into 12+ Grafana dashboards.
[Result] The platform maintained 99.5% infrastructure uptime while establishing a single-pane operating baseline for metrics and logs.

personalProjects.name: n8n Automation
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] Alerting, deployment, and data-collection tasks depended on scattered scripts and manual execution.
[Action] I built 15+ workflows on n8n and connected Slack, GitHub, Cloudflare, and Grafana into one automation hub.
[Result] The system now runs 200+ executions per day and processes 6K+ automation events per month as a stable operations orchestration layer.

personalProjects.name: Fortinet API Client
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] Firewall policy checks, route lookups, and log-statistics collection depended on manual CLI work and separate consoles.
[Action] I built a Python library that wraps the FortiManager and FortiAnalyzer REST APIs and abstracts policy lookup, route management, and log statistics into reusable methods.
[Result] The library reduced manual operating time by 80% and established a reusable API foundation for security automation.

metrics.features: Policy lookup, route management, and log statistics

personalProjects.name: Security Alert System
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] FortiGate security events were split across devices and log systems, which delayed real-time response.
[Action] I operated 32 Splunk detection rules and built a Python + Slack Block Kit notification pipeline for immediate triage.
[Result] Alerts are delivered within 30 seconds after an event and the automation baseline helps cut unnecessary alerts by 70%.

metrics.responseTime: Alert within 30 seconds after event detection

personalProjects.name: IP Blacklist Platform
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] Threat-intelligence feeds were scattered, making it hard to compare and analyze malicious IPs quickly.
[Action] I combined a Flask REST API with a Next.js dashboard and applied GeoIP enrichment in PostgreSQL to consolidate 3+ threat-intelligence feeds into a single workflow.
[Result] The platform created one place to collect, analyze, and inspect malicious IP intelligence, reducing lookup overhead for threat review.

personalProjects.name: HYCU FSDS Autonomous Driving
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] The Formula Student Driverless Simulator required stable perception and control for cone detection and path following.
[Action] I integrated Python-based LiDAR cone detection (Grid BFS), Pure Pursuit path tracking, and a three-tier safety state machine in a ROS + Docker + AirSim environment.
[Result] The project won the Excellence Award at the Hanyang Cyber University Formula competition and delivered a working simulator-based autonomous driving stack.

personalProjects.name: Resume Portfolio
personalProjects.description:
[Problem] Career history, projects, and operating signals were spread across separate documents, which made recruiter review slower.
[Action] I built a Cloudflare Workers portfolio and combined JSON-LD SEO, Grafana Loki logging, and /health, /metrics, and Web Vitals tracking into one web asset.
[Result] The result is a low-latency, globally distributed public portfolio at resume.jclee.me with verifiable deployment and health signals.

metrics.cicd: GitLab CI/CD auto deployment + deployment timestamp injection

hero.title: Jaecheol Lee
hero.subtitle: Finance/Public Security Infrastructure · Splunk ES 32 Rules · FortiGate HA 99.99% · n8n Automation 70%

achievements: Designed Nextrade ATS security infrastructure to a 99.99% HA target and passed FSC production approval.
Built an integrated Splunk-FortiNet security operations system with 32 detection rules and alerts delivered within 30 seconds.
Reduced unnecessary Nextrade alerts by 70% and cut firewall policy lookup time by 80% through operations automation.
Operated an observability platform with 12+ dashboards, 50+ metric endpoints, and 99.5% uptime across the homelab.
Built an n8n automation platform with 15+ workflows, 200+ daily executions, and 6K+ monthly automation events.
At Jointree, achieved 80% prevention effectiveness with 200 blocked incidents per month, 20% better sensitive-data detection, and 99.9% service availability.
At Metanet, reduced NAC exception processing by 90% (30 minutes → 3 minutes) and switch inspection time by 75% (8 hours → 2 hours).
At Metanet, resolved antivirus-VPN conflicts to reduce support tickets by 40% (20/week → 12/week) and delivered three new sites.
At KAI, removed 30% of duplicate firewall rules (3,000 → 2,100) and maintained zero internal data-leak incidents.
At FunNC, reduced MTTR by 50% (2 hours → 1 hour) through backup/recovery automation and improved early vulnerability detection by 80%.
At Quant, established Terraform-based AWS security codification and prepared the platform for robo-advisor testbed security review.
